entries.title: Stop error information isn't displayed on the blue screen in Windows - Microsoft Support
entries.h1: Stop error information isn't displayed on the blue screen in Windows
entries.snippet: This article describes an issue that occurs when a computer displays a blue screen in Windows 8.1, Windows Server 2012 R2, Windows 8, or Windows Server 2012. You can fix this issue by using the update or hotfix in this article. Before you install this update or hotfix, see the section. This behavior is by design in Windows 8.1, Windows Server 2012 R2, Windows 8, and Windows Server 2012 because it makes the blue screen cleaner. If you want to the Stop error information to be displayed, apply the
